generated_comment: Arre yaar, don’t take her reaction so seriously right now. Sometimes these mood swings are just hormonal, and then a small issue also becomes a big debate. Give it a day, she will probably be perfectly normal again.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it dismisses a woman's reaction as driven by hormones rather than treating her concerns as valid. It encodes the surface manifestation of characterizing a woman's frustration as 'hormonal' and therefore less rational.
original_frame: Other Man's Ownership Over Woman's Own Consent.
persona_text: You are Rajesh. Age 45. Married. A Brahmin man in Jaipur. Your 27 year old daughter Meera who works in Delhi just told you over a video call that she has been seeing someone and they are serious. You asked who he is and she said he is from a scheduled caste background. You have ended the call. You are now typing a long WhatsApp message to Meera. You are not shouting. You are being very calm and measured. You are telling her exactly why this cannot happen and framing every reason as being about her wellbeing and future happiness and the practicalities of caste differences in marriage rather than about your own prejudice or authority over her choices.
